$comment: Locveil report-protocol machine core (HK-3/PROD-6). Commons-owned, tagged report-protocol-vN. Consumers PIN a copy and VALIDATE against it (one test per writer; the reports repo's bootstrap GENERATES its labels from it). The wire-visible surface ONLY — judgment/policy lives in process/problem-reports.md. Ticket TYPE is a first-class dimension (HK-3 extension check): v1 ships problem-report; feature-request arrives as a vN bump, not a schema break. Slugs state the TARGET truth: the reports repo consumes this at its PROD-14 phase-1 transfer.

labels.name: fix-pr-open
labels.description: A fix PR is open on a code repo

problem-report.label: problem-report

transitions.handover: flip the lens label, post the handover comment, stay in triage

problem-report.terminal: owner closes the issue; the outcome bucket label STAYS as the record
